mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, phone, role, status, register_time, member_level, study_record_count, favorite_count, last_login_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted
mapper.select: select from admin_users where id = #{id} and deleted = false
select from admin_users where username = #{username} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update admin_users set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, register_time = #{registerTime}, member_level = #{memberLevel}, study_record_count = #{studyRecordCount}, favorite_count = #{favoriteCount}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
